costs_slippage.method: subtract one-way turnover * bps/10000 from daily portfolio returns

data_source: Alpaca/qfa real daily OHLCV via AlpacaGateway StockHistoricalDataClient, feed=iex unless profile overrides; no CSV and no --data-csv

decision.rationale: Rejected: 10 bps random-window median/p25 Sharpe and pure-commodity ETF proxy evidence do not satisfy robustness gates.

limitations: ETF/ETN commodity proxies are not futures; roll yield/collateral curves unavailable in qfa.
AlpacaGateway in this repo does not expose adjusted-price controls.
Monthly stateless qfa model freezes weights using calendar-month anchors rather than persisted state.

parameters.bucket: lowest skew tercile long, highest skew tercile short

random_windows.method: 12 deterministic pseudo-random windows from 2020-2025 using fixed selected universe and lagged features

sanitized_provenance: Configured paper-data access was used with credential values redacted; evaluation used real market data, no CSV, no daemon, and no orders.

selection_filters.commodity_exposure_purity: primary selected from commodity-linked ETF/ETN pool; sector equity proxies diagnostic-only

selection_rationale: Selected symbols had enough Alpaca daily history/coverage from the fixed pure commodity ETF/ETN candidate pool. This is an ETF/ETN proxy test, not a futures replication; products embed roll methodology, fees, issuer construction and possible tracking error.
